## ✨ Features

- **Use your Parley account for AI — no API key needed (cloud edition).** Sign in and pick the new **Parley** model provider to run evaluations and Q&A on Parley's hosted AI, with a monthly usage allowance shown right in Settings. Bring-your-own-key still works exactly as before.
- **History folders.** Organize recordings into folders — personal and shared-with-your-org — with drag-and-drop and a default save location.
- **Voice typing.** A global push-to-talk dictation overlay (hold the fn key) that types into any app, plus a dictation history.
- **Edition badge.** Settings now shows whether you're on the **Official** or **OSS** build next to the version.

_Cloud edition: hosted AI is metered against a per-account usage quota._
